arts.ttl: 'Incredibly proud' - Sydney FC boss sends classy parting message to £1.2m Portsmouth new boy
arts.sum: Sydney FC head coach Ufuk Talay has given Hayden Matthews his blessing after he sealed his move to Pompey.

arts.ttl: 'Slightly heavy': Portsmouth ramping up Fratton Park squad exits as transfer window ticks down
arts.sum: Pompey are ready to ramp up Fratton Park departures as a consequence of Hayden Matthews’ recruitment.

arts.ttl: Alex Neil building confidence of Millwall players - wants them to kick on after Championship win
arts.sum: Alex Neil says his Millwall side need to back up their performance and result at Luton when they face Portsmouth at Fratton Park tonight. “What happens is when you inherit a squad that’s not been winning a lot of games they are low on confidence.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss makes 'gamble' admission after £1.2m transfer of 'impressive' Australian international
arts.sum: John Mousinho concedes Hayden Matthews represents a £1.2m ‘gamble’ for Pompey.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Millwall injury and team news as 11 out and 2 doubts
arts.sum: Pompey and Millwall meet in the EFL Championship at Fratton Park on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Is Portsmouth v Millwall on TV? Kick-off time, tteam news, tickets and how to watch Championship fixture
arts.sum: All you need to know about Pompey’s EFL Championship fixture with Millwall.

arts.ttl: ‘Best away following I’ve ever seen…think of noise if they had something to cheer’: West Brom and Portsmouth react
arts.sum: Pompey fans once again failed to yield at West Brom, as they backed their team relentlessly in the face of a seventh away defeat on the spin and a 5-1 thrashing. Both sets of fans had then had plenty to say on X, formerly Twitter, here’s a selection of those views.

arts.ttl: Bookies' new predicted Championship table after Portsmouth lose, Cardiff City and Hull City win
arts.sum: Pompey suffered a 5-1 defeat to West Brom at the weekend which has had a significant impact on their final predicted finish in the Championship.

arts.ttl: No sensational Portsmouth reunion on cards for defender amid Middlesbrough exit rumours and Derby links
arts.sum: Pompey are not plotting a sensational return to Fratton Park for Matt Clarke.

arts.ttl: Buoyant Portsmouth boss hails 100 per cent success rate on January transfer targets - and more are on the way
arts.sum: Buoyant Pompey have successfully captured all of their top January targets so far.
